verdicts.title: UNAUDITED HIGH-TVL PROTOCOL
verdicts.description: Protocol has $2,566,326,514 TVL without documented audit

vulnerabilities.title: Unchecked Arithmetic Block
vulnerabilities.description: Contract uses unchecked blocks. Verify overflow is intentional.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Ensure unchecked arithmetic cannot cause security issues

_validation.reason: No automated validator for detector: unchecked-arithmetic-pattern

vulnerabilities.title: Potentially Unchecked ERC20 Transfer
vulnerabilities.description: ERC20 transfer may not check return value. Non-standard tokens may return false instead of reverting.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Use SafeERC20 library or check return value

_validation.reason: No automated validator for detector: unchecked-transfer-pattern

vulnerabilities.title: Potential Reentrancy via transfer/send
vulnerabilities.description: State change after transfer/send. Lower risk due to gas limits but still a pattern violation.

_validation.reason: No automated validator for detector: reentrancy-transfer-pattern

vulnerabilities.title: Timestamp Dependence
vulnerabilities.description: Contract logic depends on block.timestamp. Miners can manipulate slightly.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Avoid using timestamps for critical logic or use block.number

_validation.reason: No automated validator for detector: timestamp-dependence-pattern
